definition: Difficult to understand

sentence.en: The math problem was too complex for the students to solve without help.
sentence.uz: Matematika masalasi talabalar yordamsiz yechishi uchun juda murakkab edi.

definition: the act of trying to do something, especially something difficult

sentence.en: She made a brave attempt to climb the mountain.
sentence.uz: U toqqa chiqish uchun jasorat bilan urinish qildi.

definition: highly valued or esteemed

sentence.en: Your help during this difficult time is heartily appreciated.
sentence.uz: Ushbu qiyin davrdagi yordamingiz chin dildan qadrlanadi.

definition: having lost your confidence or enthusiasm for something

sentence.en: He felt discouraged after failing the exam.
sentence.uz: U imtihondan o'tolmagach, tushkunlikka tushgan edi.

definition: be familiar with something

sentence.en: I am accustomed to waking up early in the morning.
sentence.uz: Men erta tongda uyg'onishga o'rganib qolganman.

definition: to make a mistake, such as repeating something or pausing for too long, while speaking

sentence.en: He managed to stumble through his speech despite being very nervous.
sentence.uz: U juda asabiy bo'lishiga qaramay, nutqi davomida qoqilib ketish bilan bo'lsa ham gapira oldi.

definition: to improve your knowledge of something already learned but partly forgotten (refresh)

sentence.en: I need to brush up on my French before traveling to Paris.
sentence.uz: Parijga sayohat qilishdan oldin fransuz tilidagi bilimlarimni yangilashim kerak.

definition: if something is compulsory, you must do it because of a rule or law

sentence.en: Education is compulsory for children in many countries.
sentence.uz: Ko'plab mamlakatlarda bolalar uchun ta'lim olish majburiy hisoblanadi.

definition: to be removed from something(school)

sentence.en: His name was wiped off the school register after he moved away.
sentence.uz: U ko'chib ketganidan so'ng, uning ismi maktab ro'yxatidan o'chirilgan.

definition: the subjects studied in a school, college, etc. and what subject includes

sentence.en: The new school curriculum focuses more on science and technology.
sentence.uz: Yangi maktab o'quv dasturi ko'proq fan va texnologiyalarga qaratilgan.

definition: to attract someone’s attention

sentence.en: The new advertisement is designed to appeal to younger audiences.
sentence.uz: Yangi reklama yoshroq auditoriyani jalb qilish uchun mo'ljallangan.

definition: to help

sentence.en: I will assist you with your heavy luggage.
sentence.uz: Men sizga og'ir yuklaringiz bilan yordamlashmoqchiman.

definition: to have a lot of a particular type of people or things near you

sentence.en: The famous singer was surrounded by her fans.
sentence.uz: Mashhur xonanda o'z muxlislari bilan qurshab olingan edi.

definition: pleased with your situation not hoping for change or improvement

sentence.en: He was quite content with his simple life in the village.
sentence.uz: U qishloqdagi oddiy hayotidan ancha qoniqarli edi.

definition: of an acceptable standard; satisfactory

sentence.en: Everyone deserves a decent place to live.
sentence.uz: Har kim yashash uchun munosib joyga loyiqdir.

definition: someone who is wealthy has a large amount of money, property, or valuable possessions

sentence.en: She came from a wealthy background and never had to worry about money.
sentence.uz: U boy kelib chiqishga ega edi va hech qachon pul haqida qayg'urmagan.

definition: a person who is provided by money

sentence.en: The new project was completely financed by the government.
sentence.uz: Yangi loyiha to'liq hukumat tomonidan moliyalangan.

definition: beneficial; useful

sentence.en: Investing in real estate has proven to be very profitable.
sentence.uz: Ko'chmas mulkka sarmoya kiritish juda foydali ekanini ko'rsatdi.

definition: a large or sufficient amount or quantity; more than enough.

sentence.en: We have plenty of time to finish the work before the deadline.
sentence.uz: Muddatidan oldin ishni tugatish uchun bizda vaqt mo'l.

definition: be without or deficient in

sentence.en: The team members lack the experience needed for this project.
sentence.uz: Jamoa a'zolarida ushbu loyiha uchun kerakli tajriba yetishmasligi bor.

definition: a person who is unable to read or write

sentence.en: Programs have been set up to help illiterate adults learn to read.
sentence.uz: Savodsiz kattalarga o'qishni o'rganishda yordam berish uchun dasturlar yo'lga qo'yilgan.

definition: In scientific use, (a measure of) the influence that changes movement

sentence.en: Gravity is the force that pulls objects toward the Earth.
sentence.uz: Gravitatsiya - ob'ektlarni Yerga tortadigan kuch.

definition: In the intervening period of time

sentence.en: She was studying for exams; meanwhile, her friends were playing outside.
sentence.uz: U imtihonlarga tayyorlanayotgan edi; shu vaqtda do'stlari tashqarida o'ynashyotgan edi.

definition: Not or no longer needed or useful; superfluous.

sentence.en: The introduction of the new software made the old system redundant.
sentence.uz: Yangi dasturiy ta'minotning joriy etilishi eski tizimni keraksiz qildi.

definition: The assignment of employees or resources to a new place or task.

sentence.en: The factory closure led to the redeployment of many workers to other branches.
sentence.uz: Zavodning yopilishi ko'plab xodimlarning boshqa filiallarga ishchilar rolini almashuviga olib keldi.

definition: Work, especially physical work

sentence.en: Building the pyramids required a massive amount of manual labour.
sentence.uz: Piramidalarni qurish juda katta hajmdagi jismoniy mehnat talab qilgan.

definition: Time when one is not working or occupied; free time.

sentence.en: He enjoys reading books during his leisure hours.
sentence.uz: U o'zining bo'sh vaqtlarida kitob o'qishni yoqtiradi.

definition: A violent or sudden change or disruption to something.

sentence.en: The country experienced a major political upheaval last year.
sentence.uz: Mamlakat o'tgan yili yirik siyosiy g'alayonni boshdan kechirdi.

definition: A settled way of thinking or feeling about something

sentence.en: She has a very positive attitude towards her work.
sentence.uz: Uning o'z ishiga nisbatan juda ijobiy munosabati bor.

definition: To consider or have an opinion about something or someone

sentence.en: He is widely regarded as one of the best doctors in the city.
sentence.uz: U shahar ichidagi eng yaxshi shifokorlardan biri deb hisoblanadi.

definition: Regarded or represented as larger, better, or worse than in reality

sentence.en: The reports of the damage were highly exaggerated.
sentence.uz: Zarar haqidagi xabarlar juda bo'rttirilgan edi.

definition: Restricted in area or volume; cramped.

sentence.en: Because of his illness, he was confined to his bed for a week.
sentence.uz: Kasalligi sababli u bir hafta davomida to'shakka cheklangan edi.

definition: Be greater in number or size than (a quantity, number, or other measurable thing)

sentence.en: The cost of the repairs will not exceed one hundred dollars.
sentence.uz: Ta'mirlash xarajatlari yuz dollardan oshib ketmaydi.

definition: Indicate the truth or existence of (something) by suggestion rather than explicit reference

sentence.en: Did his words imply that he was unhappy with the decision?
sentence.uz: Uning so'zlari qarordan norozi ekanligiga ishora qildimi?

definition: Found or distributed over a large area or number of people.

sentence.en: There is widespread support for the new environmental policy.
sentence.uz: Yangi ekologik siyosat uchun keng tarqalgan qo'llab-quvvatlash mavjud.

definition: A situation that is unavoidable.

sentence.en: When dealing with strict deadlines, some stress is inevitable.
sentence.uz: Qat'iy muddatlar bilan ishlaganda biroz stress bo'lishi muqarrar.

definition: The amount of work to be done by someone or something.

sentence.en: She struggled to manage her heavy workload at the office.
sentence.uz: U ofisdagi og'ir ish hajmini eplay olishga qiynaldi.

definition: A feeling of disappointment resulting from the discovery that something is not as good as one believed it to be.

sentence.en: There is growing disillusionment among voters with the current political system.
sentence.uz: Saylovchilar orasida hozirgi siyosiy tizimdan ko'ngil qolishi o'sib bormoqda.

definition: grasp (something) tightly.

sentence.en: He started to clutch his chest tightly in sudden pain.
sentence.uz: U to'satdan og'riq tufayli ko'kragini qattiq siqmoqni boshladi.

definition: a curved pointed horny nail on each digit of the foot in birds, lizards, and some mammals.

sentence.en: The cat sharpened its claws on the scratching post.
sentence.uz: Mushuk tirnash ustunida tirnoqlarini o'tkirladi.

definition: physically or spiritually devastating

sentence.en: The tiger has a crushing bite that easily breaks bones.
sentence.uz: Yo'lbarsning osongina suyaklarni sindiradigan o'ldiruvchi tishlashi bor.

definition: cause (liquid) to strike or fall on something in irregular drops

sentence.en: The children love to splash water in the pool.
sentence.uz: Bolalar basseynda suv sachratishni yaxshi ko'radilar.

definition: as far as one knows or can see

sentence.en: Apparently, it is going to rain this afternoon.
sentence.uz: Aftidan, bugun tushdan keyin yomg'ir yog'adi.

definition: slightly wet.

sentence.en: The ground was still damp from the morning dew.
sentence.uz: Yer ertalabki shudring tufayli hamon nam edi.

definition: plants considered collectively, especially those found in a particular area or habitat.

sentence.en: The jungle is known for its dense and lush vegetation.
sentence.uz: Changalzor o'zining qalin va yam-yashil o'simliklari bilan mashhur.

definition: an animal that is caught and killed by another for food

sentence.en: The eagle swooped down to catch its prey.
sentence.uz: Burgut o'z o'ljasini ushlash uchun pastga sho'ng'idi.

definition: to trust or believe (someone or something), heavily

sentence.en: Modern businesses rely heavily on the internet to operate.
sentence.uz: Zamonaviy korxonalar faoliyat yuritish uchun internetga qattiq ishonadi.

definition: land that lacks significant variation in elevation

sentence.en: The region consists mostly of flat terrain, making it ideal for farming.
sentence.uz: Mintaqa asosan yassi erlardan iborat, bu uni dehqonchilik uchun qulay qiladi.

definition: protect or shield from something harmful, especially bad weather.

sentence.en: We had to shelter under a tree during the heavy rain.
sentence.uz: Kuchli yomg'ir paytida biz daraxt ostida boshpana topishga majbur bo'ldik.

definition: uncomfortably or unpleasantly cold

sentence.en: It was a bit chilly outside, so she wore a sweater.
sentence.uz: Tashqari biroz sovuq edi, shuning uchun u sviter kiyib oldi.

definition: in every case or on every occasion; always

sentence.en: He invariably arrives late for meetings.
sentence.uz: U yig'ilishlarga o'zgarmas holda kechikib keladi.

definition: an abstract idea

sentence.en: The concept of infinity is difficult for many to grasp.
sentence.uz: Cheksizlik tushunchasi ko'pchilik uchun tushunishga qiyin.

definition: having existed or done something for a long time and therefore recognized and generally accepted.

sentence.en: The university is an established institution with a long history.
sentence.uz: Universitet uzoq tarixga ega bo'lgan ta'sis etilgan muassasadir.

definition: be appropriate, related, or applicable to.

sentence.en: We only need information that pertains directly to this case.
sentence.uz: Bizga faqat ushbu ishga bevosita tegishli bo'lgan ma'lumotlar kerak.

definition: involving or relating to serious academic study.

sentence.en: She has written numerous scholarly articles on ancient history.
sentence.uz: U qadimgi tarixga oid ko'plab ilmiy maqolalar yozgan.

definition: consider (something) along with other factors before reaching a decision.

sentence.en: We must take into account the budget before planning the trip.
sentence.uz: Sayohatni rejalashtirishdan oldin biz byudjetni hisobga olishimiz kerak.

definition: existing at a particular time; current.

sentence.en: The prevailing opinion is that the project will succeed.
sentence.uz: Ustun keluvchi fikr shundaki, loyiha muvaffaqiyatli bo'ladi.

definition: a general rule, principle, or piece of advice.

sentence.en: The government issued a new health safety guideline.
sentence.uz: Hukumat yangi sog'liqni saqlash xavfsizligi yo'riqnomasini chiqardi.

definition: producing fear in others

sentence.en: The lion is one of the most feared predators in the wild.
sentence.uz: Sher yovvoyi tabiatdagi eng qo'rqinchli yirtqichlardan biridir.

definition: make a marked change in the form, nature, or appearance of

sentence.en: The caterpillar will slowly transform into a beautiful butterfly.
sentence.uz: Kapalak qurti sekin-asta chiroyli kapalakka o'zgaradi.

definition: used to emphasize that an amount is small.

sentence.en: The entire building was destroyed in a matter of minutes.
sentence.uz: Butun bino bir necha daqiqada vayron bo'ldi.

definition: suitable or safe for eating

sentence.en: Not all mushrooms you find in the forest are edible.
sentence.uz: O'rmonda topilgan barcha qo'ziqorinlar ham yeyishli emas.

definition: the fact of not being where you are usually expected to be

sentence.en: Her long absence from school was due to a severe illness.
sentence.uz: Uning maktabdagi uzoq muddatli yo'qligi og'ir kasallik tufayli edi.
